name: Excelliance MOS Corporation
summary: Excelliance MOS Corporation operates as a power device and IC design company in Taiwan. The company is involved in the power semiconductor process development, as well as power device, IC, and system design activities. Its products include power MOSFETs, Schottky rectifiers, AC/DC and DC/DC power ICs, and LED drivers. The company's products are primarily used to the power system of electronic products, including personal computers, notebooks, pads, monitors, TVs, LED lighting, switching power, and other consumer electronics. Excelliance MOS Corporation was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.
